app.title: KeilOn Voice Assistant
app.description: AI voice assistant powered by Groq

chat.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings.

sidebar.createNewChat: Create a new chat to start
sidebar.clearHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?

assistant.greeting: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
assistant.systemPrompt:
You are a helpful voice assistant. IMPORTANT:
1. Always respond in English, regardless of the question language
2. Keep responses short and clear (1-3 sentences)
3. Be friendly and polite
4. If you don't understand the question, ask to repeat
